title: chore(deps): update dependency eslint-config-prettier to v2.9.0
body:
This Pull Request updates dependency [eslint-config-prettier](https://github.com/prettier/eslint-config-prettier) from `v2.7.0` to `v2.9.0`

**Note**: This PR was created on a configured schedule ("every weekend" in timezone `Europe/Paris`) and will not receive updates outside those times.



<details>
<summary>Commits</summary>

#### v2.8.0
-   [`199d633`](https://github.com/prettier/eslint-config-prettier/commit/199d633adc631ad64861047a7bdee50fe20c5c8f) Fix tests, script failing on windows (#​36)
-   [`63a343d`](https://github.com/prettier/eslint-config-prettier/commit/63a343d521ea6292180ae2da5cae2893725c5b82) Update Prettier

-   [`7d8be2a`](https://github.com/prettier/eslint-config-prettier/commit/7d8be2ac8949159cea0c592118b3e03fca939a97) Update eslint-plugin-react
-   [`6a25ccb`](https://github.com/prettier/eslint-config-prettier/commit/6a25ccb018c0bc9b5c561e859894be86eb52dc64) Add react/jsx-one-expression-per-line
-   [`5716c06`](https://github.com/prettier/eslint-config-prettier/commit/5716c06a1dee5abd18e59aab62629f5e4073d3fd) Update versions in readme
-   [`2f899fe`](https://github.com/prettier/eslint-config-prettier/commit/2f899fe76d7fe2e45e1df487aa962634c742a3aa) eslint-config-prettier v2.8.0
#### v2.9.0

-   [`984de70`](https://github.com/prettier/eslint-config-prettier/commit/984de70e8c6b57684b444283561019389ccebd11) eslint-config-prettier v2.9.0

</details>
